name: Butternut Squash with Pistachio, Pesto, Feta & Pomegranate Seeds
servings: serves 2 as a main course or 4 as a side dish

ingredients.item:
1 large butternut squash, quartered lengthways and deseeded
4 tbsp olive oil
sea salt
freshly ground black pepper
150g (5½oz) feta cheese
100g (3½oz) pomegranate seeds
ingredients.original:
1 large butternut squash, quartered lengthways and deseeded
4 tbsp olive oil
sea salt
freshly ground black pepper
150g (5½oz) feta cheese
100g (3½oz) pomegranate seeds

ingredients.item:
100g (3½oz) shelled pistachio nuts
70g (2½oz) Parmesan or Grana Padano cheese, chopped into rough chunks
olive oil
1 small bunch of coriander, leaves picked
1 small bunch of parsley, leaves picked
1 small bunch of dill, leaves picked
3 tbsp chilli oil
juice of 1 lemon
